channel.title: Services and Fees on Wang's Harmony Acupuncture
channel.description: Recent content in Services and Fees on Wang's Harmony Acupuncture

item.title: Acupuncture Consultation and Personalized Care
item.description: Start with a brief virtual consult, then move into mobile acupuncture care with clear next steps.

item.title: Acute and Chronic Pain Management
item.description: Mobile acupuncture for pain, headaches, nerve symptoms, and injury recovery.

item.title: Women's Health and Fertility Support
item.description: Acupuncture care for cycle health, fertility, hormone balance, and pelvic wellness.

item.title: Digestive and Metabolic Health
item.description: Support for abdominal discomfort, IBS, reflux, bloating, and metabolic health concerns.

item.title: Respiratory, Immune, and Skin Support
item.description: Acupuncture for allergies, sinus symptoms, cough, skin flare-ups, and immune support.

item.title: Stress, Sleep, and Preventive Wellness
item.description: Acupuncture care for stress, anxiety, insomnia, fatigue, and long-term wellness.
